hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 1.51 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Mr. Mohd. Hasan No. 11 Simpang Surabaya

description.short: In addition to the standard of Indonesia Care, all guests get free Wi-Fi in all rooms and free parking if arriving by car. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Children 0-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
OMG, bathroom: smelly probably from its plumbing drain: no wall or shower curtain between shower and toilet; no mirror in above the sink. No place to put soap and shampoo in the shower. Sink table is too small. No place to place your toiletries 


The bed: only one power outlet at the head of the bed; no power outlet near the table work table for your coffee pot or for your laptop

Key: only gives one key card . Your room will be hot when you come back; no power if you leave the room: you need the key card to turn on power

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: The smell of cigarettes, stagnant water, the AC is not cold, there are no clear TV broadcasts, it's a mess.
comments.originalComment: Kamar bau rokok, air lelet, AC tdk dingin, siaran TV gak ada yg jernih, kacau

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Strategic location, close to a coffee shop that is open 24 hours. There is a mosque nearby at the back of the hotel for Friday prayers. The condition from the front of the hotel is nice, but the interior is just standard, like an inn. Bring room scent or camphor to help a little. The bathroom faucet squeaks. The heater works normally.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi strategis, dekat warkop yg sedia 24 jam juga. Masjid dekat di belakamg hotel kalau soljumat. Kondisi dari depan hotel cantik, di dalemnya standar biasa aja semacam wisma. Bawalah pewangi ruangan atau kamper agar sedikit membantu. Kran kamar mandi berderit. Heater berfungsi normal

comments.reviewComments: Check in lama karena kamar belum siap, isi kamar tidak sesuai gambar, tidak ada meja, cermin dan kursi. Gantungan baju tidak ada. Karpet seperti gambar tidak ada. Kamar mandi berbau tikus mati . AC tidak dingin dan mati hidup , timer tidak bisa off

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
Tepat sekali kalau kita memilih hotel ini, karena lokasinya yang berdampingan dgn Kuliner makanan khas Aceh termasuk dengan kedai-kedai kopinya maupun kuliner daerah lain.

Masjid terletak dibelakang hotel, Halte Trans Kutaraja hanya berjarak 100 meter dari hotel yang bisa membawa kita keliling Banda Aceh.
